lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and visible body damage. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the upholstery. The engine requires major repairs and does not run reliably.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and tear on the upholstery and dashboard. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to be functional.

Get ready to drive home a true masterpiece! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and performing just like it did on day one. It has been kept in showroom-quality shape with a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that shows no signs of wear. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle in perfect, like-new condition!

This vehicle is in good, solid condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint still retains a nice shine, though you will find some minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors; the leather seats show only minor creasing on the driver's side. Mechanically, the car is in great shape—it runs smoothly, shifts as it should, and has no known leaks or warning lights. It has a complete service history and recently underwent a full inspection. While not a showroom trailer queen, this is a dependable, attractive car that is ready for its next owner to drive home with confidence.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The engine runs smoothly and reliably, and the transmission shifts through all gears without issue. Mechanically, it is sound and has no known major defects. The interior is clean with only minor signs of wear, and the exterior paint retains a good shine, though there are a few small blemishes consistent with careful use. All electronics and features are currently functional. It represents a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable car that is ready to drive immediately.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a showroom-quality interior, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and there’s not a single blemish to be found. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I know you’re going to fall in love with it the second you get behind the wheel. Come take a look!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is perfectly synchronized by the double-VANOS system, with both rod bearings and subframe reinforcement proactively addressed to exceed factory specifications. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a 3.62 limited-slip differential, the chassis dynamics remain razor-sharp with zero bushing deflection. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the paint depth and interior integrity reflect a climate-controlled existence. This is a turn-key collector-grade example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle is an absolute 'time capsule' and represents the pinnacle of its model year. The exterior is finished in a lustrous, deep metallic paint that has been professionally treated with a dual-layer ceramic coating; there are zero stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings to be found. It has been exclusively garage-kept and has never been driven in inclement weather. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state—the leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are protected by original factory mats, and all buttons and switches retain their crisp, tactile feel. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. I have maintained a comprehensive service binder documenting every fluid change and inspection performed at the dealership. The engine bay is immaculate, the tires are premium-grade with nearly full tread, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare opportunity for a collector to acquire a specimen that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. I welcome and encourage any third-party pre-purchase inspection to confirm this vehicle's exceptional state.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a commitment to uncompromising quality. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless asset in its most pristine state.

Presented for your consideration is an impeccably preserved vehicle that exemplifies automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of aesthetic and mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer, this vehicle offers a superlative driving experience and an interior that remains in pristine, original state. We invite you to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. I've absolutely babied it since day one, and it seriously looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's in pristine, mint condition—not a single scratch or smudge to be found. It drives like a dream and has been kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offered is a pristine E92 M3, a final-evolution naturally aspirated masterpiece. At its heart lies the S65 4.0L V8, utilizing eight individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio to achieve a breathtaking 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and an M-Variable limited-slip differential. This specimen is in collector-grade condition, featuring
Used vehicle in mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior. Everything functions perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with a professional ceramic coating applied to protect the flawless finish; there are absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state, smelling exactly as it did on the showroom floor. The premium leather upholstery is supple and entirely free of creases or bolster wear, while the dashboard and high-resolution displays are crystal clear. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every button, switch, and feature functions perfectly. Included in the sale are all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a custom-fitted car cover. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly preserved interior. Meticulously maintained to the highest mechanical standards, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine automotive asset.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects a standard of care that is truly rare, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, high-specification interior. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of mechanical and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents an unrivaled acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! You've absolutely got to see this beauty. It's honestly in showroom condition—I've babied it since day one and it looks like it just rolled off the lot! Not a single scratch or dent to be found, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for a ride that's basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!
